chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-3723 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For orders on Misc. No.15410/25 2. For hearing of Misc. No.17079/23 3. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025. Mr. Karim Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.7 & 8. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, Counsel for SBCA ------------------------------ ` This is an old case of 2023 which is over 02 years ago. None present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. Prayer clause reveals that this petition relates illegal constructions. Petitioner is at liberty to file/make his complaint through digital app of SBCA Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) which shall dealt by SBCA with its SOPs. As such this petition stands disposed of alongwith all pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
